# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs to download and deploy')
        string(name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVERS', description: 'Comma-separated list of production servers')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_DIR', defaultValue: '/opt/app', description: 'Directory to deploy artifacts')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactUrls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',')
                    def downloadDir = "${env.WORKSPACE}/downloads"
                    sh "mkdir -p ${downloadDir}"
                    
                    artifactUrls.each { url ->
                        def fileName = url.split('/').last()
                        sh "curl -L -o ${downloadDir}/${fileName} ${url}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS.split(',')
                    def downloadDir = "${env.WORKSPACE}/downloads"
                    
                    servers.each { server ->
                        sh "ssh ${server} 'mkdir -p ${params.DEPLOY_DIR}'"
                        
                        sh "find ${downloadDir} -type f -exec scp {} ${server}:${params.DEPLOY_DIR} \\;"
                        
                        sh "ssh ${server} 'chmod +x ${params.DEPLOY_DIR}/*'"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
